sitrep: BUSHEHR NPP HIT 4TH TIME: Projectile struck auxiliary building of Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant. 1 security officer killed, 5 injured. 163 personnel (including Russian technicians) evacuated to Russia via emergency airlift. IAEA Director Grossi: 'deep concern — nuclear sites must never be attacked.' Reactor core intact, no radiation increase. 4th attack since D1.

MAHSHAHR PETROCHEMICAL ZONE STRUCK: US-Israeli strikes hit multiple locations in Mahshahr Special Petrochemical Zone (Khuzestan) — Iran's major petrochemical hub. 5 wounded. Smoke visible for miles. Combined with Bushehr = systematic targeting of Iran's energy/nuclear infrastructure 2 days before April 6 deadline.

MSC ISHYKA ATTACKED: IRGC naval forces attacked MSC Ishyka (Israel-linked vessel) in Strait of Hormuz with drone — set on fire. Iran continuing Hormuz harassment of Israel-affiliated shipping while allowing safe passage for non-hostile vessels. Contradictory signals: safe passage framework expanding while IRGC attacks specific ships.

A-10 WARTHOG ALSO DOWNED D35: NEWLY CONFIRMED — A-10 Warthog (single-seat) also shot down near Strait of Hormuz during F-15E rescue operations. Pilot rescued. 2 Black Hawks hit by small arms fire. NPR: 'at least seven manned aircraft' lost since D1. US claims of 'total air dominance' contradicted.

WSO STILL MISSING: F-15E weapons systems officer still unaccounted for — Iran civilians searching with ~$60K bounty. Iranian state TV broadcasting calls for help. IRGC denies capture/detention (state media). Governor of Kohgiluyeh province: whoever captures crew 'will be specially commended.' WSO initially made radio contact after ejection. If captured = first US POW.

UAE: 23 BALLISTIC + 56 DRONES: UAE MoD confirmed D36 intercepts: 23 ballistic missiles + 56 drones. Cumulative: 498 ballistic + 23 cruise + 2,141 drones since D1. UAE bore brunt of Iran's retaliatory Gulf attacks D36. All intercepted before reaching targets.

CLUSTER BOMB WARHEAD ISRAEL: Iranian ballistic missile carrying cluster bomb warhead hit central Israel — submunitions spread over wide area. 1 man (52yo) lightly wounded. Cluster warheads = escalation in munition type. Houthis also claimed separate Israel attack.

IDF STRIKES QUDS FORCE + TEHRAN: IDF struck Iranian Quds Force command centers in Beirut + IRGC air defense positions, ballistic missile storage, weapons R&D in Tehran. Continued 'wide-scale' campaign. IRGC claimed shooting down MQ-1 drone over Isfahan.

IRAN REJECTS CEASEFIRE — FORMALLY: Iran's rejection communicated through 'continuation of attacks in battlefield' rather than diplomacy (Reuters). Iranian source: 'Iran demands guaranteed ceasefire to end war permanently.' F-15E shootdowns = IRGC views military success as validation of refusal. Last active diplomatic track COLLAPSED before April 6.

CASUALTIES UPDATE: HRANA: 3,531+ killed (1,607 civilians, 244 children). AJ: 2,076+. Lebanese authorities: 1,368+ (124+ children). Iraq: 109+. Israel: 24+ civilians, 6,594+ wounded. US: 15 KIA + 1 missing WSO + 520+ wounded. 7 aircraft lost.

APRIL 6 = 2 DAYS: Power grid deadline NOW 2 days away. Iran's formal ceasefire rejection = last diplomatic track collapsed. Bushehr NPP strike = coalition already hitting nuclear infrastructure. Mahshahr petrochemical = energy targeting accelerating. Missing WSO = cannot pause. April 6 strikes near-CERTAIN.
INTERNET 840+ HRS: 36 days. $1.5B+ loss. 90M isolated. 85,000+ structures. 600+ schools.
sitrep_fa: بوشهر ۴مین بار: ساختمان فرعی هدف. ۱ کشته (نگهبان)، ۵ زخمی. ۱۶۳ نفر به روسیه تخلیه. IAEA: نگرانی شدید. راکتور سالم.
پتروشیمی ماهشهر: حملات آمریکایی-اسرائیلی. ۵ زخمی. خوزستان = قلب انرژی. ۲ روز تا ۶ آوریل.
MSC ایشیکا: پهپاد سپاه در هرمز — آتش. کشتی مرتبط اسرائیل. عبور امن ادامه اما حمله اهداف خاص.
A-10 نیز ساقط D35: تأیید جدید. ۷ هواپیمای آمریکایی. ادعای تسلط هوایی رد شد.
WSO مفقود: جستجو ادامه. ~$۶۰K جایزه. رسانه‌های ایران درخواست کمک. اگر اسیر = اولین POW.
امارات: ۲۳ بالستیک + ۵۶ پهپاد: مجموع: ۴۹۸/۲۳/۲,۱۴۱. بیشترین حمله D36.
بمب خوشه‌ای اسرائیل: بالستیک با کلاهک خوشه‌ای. ۱ زخمی. حوثی نیز حمله.
IDF نیروی قدس + تهران: فرماندهی قدس بیروت + IRGC تهران. MQ-1 ساقط اصفهان.
ایران آتش‌بس رد — رسمی: ادامه حملات = پاسخ. مسیر دیپلماتیک آخر فروپاشید.
تلفات: HRANA ۳,۵۳۱+. AJ ۲,۰۷۶+. لبنان ۱,۳۶۸+. عراق ۱۰۹+. آمریکا ۱۵ KIA + ۱ مفقود.
۶ آوریل = ۲ روز: رد آتش‌بس = مسیر آخر. بوشهر + ماهشهر = تشدید. WSO مفقود. حمله تقریباً قطعی.

Bushehr NPP 4th hit + Mahshahr petrochemical = coalition pre-positioning for April 6 by degrading energy/nuclear infrastructure NOW. timeline.title: Week 6 begins (Apr 04)
timeline.body: Bushehr NPP 4th hit (1 killed, 163 evacuated to Russia). Mahshahr petrochemical struck. MSC Ishyka attacked in Hormuz. A-10 also downed (6th aircraft). Iran formally rejected ceasefire. Oil ~$115. April 6 = 2 DAYS.

timeline.title: APRIL 6 (2 DAYS)
timeline.body: IMMINENT: Iran formally rejected ceasefire = last diplomatic track collapsed. Bushehr + Mahshahr = coalition already targeting energy/nuclear. 163 evacuated to Russia = international incident. WSO missing = cannot pause. Power grid strikes near-CERTAIN.

timeline.title: Month 2

timeline.title: Month 3+
timeline.body: If post-April 6 strikes: humanitarian catastrophe -> forced intervention. If surprise deal: phased de-escalation. Mine clearance months. Nuclear unresolved. WSO status critical.

timeline.title: Wild cards
timeline.body: April 6 strikes. WSO capture (POW?). Bushehr radiation incident. Russia response to personnel evacuation. Houthi Bab al-Mandab closure. Physical Brent $141 = recession trigger.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش ۱۰->۸. ایران رد رسمی = ادامه حملات. مسیر فعال ندارد. ۲ روز ناکافی.

theoryEvaluation.title: BUSHEHR NPP 4TH HIT — nuclear red line crossed repeatedly
theoryEvaluation.body: 4th attack on Iran's only operating nuclear power plant. 1 killed, 5 injured, 163 personnel evacuated to RUSSIA. IAEA Grossi: 'deep concern — nuclear sites must never be attacked.' Russia now directly involved (evacuating its technicians). No radiation increase but each strike increases risk. International condemnation growing. This is the clearest nuclear-adjacent escalation yet.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRAN FORMALLY REJECTS CEASEFIRE — last track collapsed
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran communicated rejection through 'continuation of attacks in battlefield' not diplomacy (Reuters). Iranian source: 'demands guaranteed permanent ceasefire.' IRGC views F-15E/A-10 shootdowns as validation of military approach. This collapses the last active diplomatic track before April 6. No mediator, no framework, no channel active. The deadline is now a military trigger, not a diplomatic lever.

theoryEvaluation.title: 7 US AIRCRAFT LOST — air dominance narrative dead
theoryEvaluation.body: NPR confirms 'at least seven manned aircraft' lost since D1. Known: 3 F-15Es (D3 friendly fire), 1 KC-135 (D12), 1 F-16 (IRGC claim D22), 1 F-15E (D35 shot down, WSO missing), 1 A-10 (D35 Hormuz), plus 2 Black Hawks damaged. IRGC denies WSO capture but governor offers commendation. Iran's air defenses clearly NOT degraded as claimed. This fundamentally undermines the 'mission accomplished' narrative.

theoryEvaluation.title: MAHSHAHR PETROCHEMICAL — pre-April 6 energy targeting
theoryEvaluation.body: Coalition striking Iran's petrochemical infrastructure 2 days before the power grid deadline. Mahshahr = major energy hub in Khuzestan. Combined with Bushehr = systematic targeting of energy/nuclear BEFORE April 6. This suggests coalition is pre-positioning, not waiting for the deadline. April 6 may be the power grid finale, not the beginning.

theoryEvaluation.title: APRIL 6 — 2 DAYS — NO DIPLOMATIC PATH REMAINING
theoryEvaluation.body: Ceasefire formally rejected. No mediator active. WSO missing = US cannot pause. Bushehr + Mahshahr = strikes already hitting energy infrastructure. Physical oil $141 = unprecedented. Russia evacuating Bushehr = new international dimension. EVERY indicator points to April 6 power grid strikes proceeding. The question is no longer IF but HOW COMPREHENSIVE.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: بوشهر ۴مین بار — خط قرمز هسته‌ای بارها عبور
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۱ کشته، ۵ زخمی، ۱۶۳ تخلیه به روسیه. IAEA: نگرانی شدید. روسیه مستقیماً درگیر. هر حمله ریسک بالاتر.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ایران رد رسمی آتش‌بس — مسیر آخر فروپاشید
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: رد از طریق ادامه حملات نه دیپلماسی. F-15E/A-10 = تأیید رویکرد نظامی. مسیر فعال ندارد. مهلت = ماشه نظامی.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ۷ هواپیمای آمریکایی ساقط — تسلط هوایی مرده
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: NPR: حداقل ۷ هواپیما. سپاه بازداشت WSO رد اما استاندار تشویق. ارتباط رادیویی اولیه. پدافند سالم.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ماهشهر — هدف‌گیری انرژی قبل ۶ آوریل
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: پتروشیمی + بوشهر = سیستماتیک قبل مهلت. پیش‌موقعیت‌دهی. ۶ آوریل = پایانه نه آغاز.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: ۶ آوریل — ۲ روز — مسیر دیپلماتیک نمانده
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: رد رسمی. میانجی فعال نیست. WSO مفقود. بوشهر + ماهشهر = حمله شروع شده. نفت فیزیکی $۱۴۱. سوال = چقدر جامع.

endstate.title: Most likely (38%)
endstate.body: Escalation — INCREASED 33->38%. Iran formally REJECTED ceasefire. Bushehr NPP 4th hit (163 to Russia). Mahshahr petrochemical struck. April 6 = 2 DAYS. Coalition pre-positioning. WSO missing. Oil ~$115. NEAR-CERTAIN April 6 power grid strikes.

endstate_fa.title: اول (۳۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: تشدید — افزایش ۳۳->۳۸. ایران رد رسمی. بوشهر (۱۶۳ به روسیه). ماهشهر. ۲ روز. تقریباً قطعی.

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۷٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایش — کاهش ۲۸->۲۷. ۶ آوریل دوگانه. اما اگر تأخیر: فرسایش. امارات ۲۳+۵۶.

endstate_fa.title: سوم (۱۴٪)
endstate_fa.body: اعلام پیروزی — کاهش. ۷ هواپیما. WSO مفقود. بوشهر به روسیه.

endstate_fa.title: چهارم
endstate_fa.body: مذاکره (۸٪ — رد). مداخله (۹٪ — بعد ۶ آوریل ۲۰-۳۰٪). فروپاشی (۴٪).

Internet 840+ hrs = verification impossible. AJ (2,076) vs HRANA (3,531+) vs Iran Intl (4,800+) vs Hengaw (7,800+) = wide variance. The Intercept: US military 'casualty cover-up.'

diplomacy: IRAN FORMALLY REJECTS CEASEFIRE: Iran communicated rejection through 'continuation of attacks in battlefield' — not through diplomacy (Reuters). Iranian source: 'demands guaranteed permanent ceasefire.' This collapses the LAST active diplomatic track before April 6. No mediator, no channel, no framework active.

CEASEFIRE REJECTION = MILITARY VALIDATION: F-15E/A-10 shootdowns came hours before formal rejection. IRGC views military success (7 US aircraft, ships attacked) as validation of refusal to negotiate. Iran sees battlefield strength, not diplomatic concession, as path forward.

BUSHEHR 163 TO RUSSIA = NEW DIMENSION: 163 Bushehr NPP personnel evacuated to Russia via emergency airlift. Russia now directly involved in conflict consequences. Creates new diplomatic complication and potential Russian leverage/reaction.

CHINA-PAKISTAN PLAN STALLED: 5-point peace plan remains on paper. Kharazi (back-channel lead) gravely wounded. Iran's formal rejection undermines framework. The Diplomat: 'All words, no commitment.' No active great-power mediation.

IAEA GROSSI — NUCLEAR RED LINE: 'Deep concern — nuclear sites must never be attacked.' 4th Bushehr strike. But IAEA has no enforcement power. International condemnation ≠ action. UN framework paralyzed.

APRIL 6 (2 DAYS) — NO PATH TO DEAL: Zero diplomatic tracks active. Iran rejected. WSO missing. Coalition pre-positioning (Bushehr + Mahshahr). Power grid strikes converging toward certainty. The deadline is now a military countdown, not a diplomatic deadline.
diplomacy_fa: ایران رد رسمی آتش‌بس: از طریق ادامه حملات نه دیپلماسی. مسیر آخر فروپاشید. ۲ روز.
رد = تأیید نظامی: F-15E/A-10 ساقط = سپاه نتیجه نظامی را تأیید. مذاکره نه، میدان جنگ بله.
بوشهر ۱۶۳ به روسیه = بُعد جدید: تخلیه اضطراری. روسیه مستقیماً درگیر. اهرم/واکنش روسیه.
طرح چین-پاکستان متوقف: خرازی زخمی. ایران رد رسمی. دیپلمات: فقط حرف.
IAEA گروسی — خط قرمز هسته‌ای: نگرانی شدید. ۴مین بوشهر. اما قدرت اجرایی ندارد.
۶ آوریل (۲ روز) — مسیر معامله ندارد: صفر مسیر فعال. ایران رد. WSO مفقود. پیش‌موقعیت‌دهی. شمارش معکوس نظامی.
publicOpinion: Pew (D27): 59% wrong. 61% disapprove. 88% Dems oppose. 71% GOP support. 7 aircraft lost + missing WSO = 'enough is enough' pressure intensifying. But Bushehr nuclear = rally-around-flag for some.

6 AIRCRAFT + WSO: A-10 also downed = NPR headline 'total air dominance contradicted.' WSO missing = daily hostage-crisis news cycle. Washington Times: Iran 'calls on public to find enemy pilot.' Visceral. Political pressure on Trump from BOTH directions.
Gas: $4.30+ estimated. Oil ~$115 and rising. Physical Brent $141 = recession signal. April 6 power grid strikes = gas $5+ CERTAIN. Consumer pain approaching political breaking point.
Congressional: AUMF still absent. 7 aircraft lost = congressional demand for briefings intensifying. Casualty transparency still contested (The Intercept investigation).
Casualties: 15 US KIA + 1 MISSING WSO + 520+ wounded. 7 aircraft lost. The Intercept: 'casualty cover-up.' Missing pilot = daily political pressure. Bushehr evacuation = international complications.
International: IAEA Grossi condemns Bushehr strike. Russia evacuating personnel = new dimension. Dated Brent $141 = global recession fears. April 6 = world bracing for humanitarian catastrophe.
publicOpinion_fa: ۷ هواپیما + WSO: NPR: تسلط هوایی رد. WSO مفقود = اخبار گروگان‌گیری روزانه. فشار دوطرفه بر ترامپ.
کنگره: AUMF ندارد. ۷ هواپیما = درخواست توجیه شدیدتر.
تلفات: ۱۵ KIA + ۱ WSO مفقود + ۵۲۰+ زخمی. اینترسپت: پنهان‌کاری. بوشهر تخلیه = بین‌المللی.
بین‌المللی: IAEA محکوم. روسیه تخلیه = بُعد جدید. برنت $۱۴۱ = رکود جهانی. ۶ آوریل = فاجعه.
hormuz: DUAL POSTURE — SAFE PASSAGE + TARGETED ATTACKS: ~8 vessels/day D36 (up from 7). Safe passage framework expanding BUT IRGC drone attacked MSC Ishyka (Israel-linked) — set on fire. Iran allowing non-hostile transit while attacking Israel-affiliated shipping. Selective enforcement.

MSC ISHYKA ATTACK: IRGC naval forces struck Israel-linked vessel MSC Ishyka in Hormuz with drone. Ship on fire. Demonstrates Iran's ability to selectively target specific vessels while allowing others through. This is managed escalation, not blockade relaxation.

Safe passage growing: Pakistan, India, China, Thailand, Philippines, France (CMA CGM). ~8-10 vessels/day. Iran yuan/crypto toll. US/Israel still excluded. UK hosting 40-nation talks on Hormuz reopening. Framework institutional not personal (surviving Tangsiri death).
WSO search area: F-15E WSO still missing in southern Iran. Rescue ops no longer restricting strait traffic but WSO = ongoing crisis.
Kharg: Fortified. 82nd deployed. April 6 = 2 days may redirect forces from Kharg to power grid targeting.
Insurance: 13%+ hull. MSC Ishyka attack D36 = ship-specific targeting continues. Approaching uninsurable threshold. Lloyd's monitoring.
Bab al-Mandab: Houthis claimed Israel attack D36. Active since D29. If April 6 strikes proceed = Houthi likely closes Bab al-Mandab = both chokepoints = oil $150+.
hormuz_fa: دوگانه — عبور امن + حملات هدفمند: ~۸ کشتی/روز. MSC ایشیکا (اسرائیلی) حمله = هدف‌گیری انتخابی. عبور غیردشمن اما اسرائیلی هدف.
حمله MSC ایشیکا: پهپاد سپاه در هرمز. آتش. هدف‌گیری انتخابی. تشدید مدیریت‌شده.
عبور رشد: پاکستان + هند + چین + تایلند + فیلیپین + فرانسه. ~۸-۱۰/روز. نهادی نه شخصی.
WSO: مفقود در جنوب ایران. عملیات جستجو ادامه.
خارگ: تقویت. ۶ آوریل = تغییر جهت به نیروگاه.
بیمه: ۱۳٪+. MSC ایشیکا = ادامه هدف‌گیری. آستانه بیمه‌ناپذیری.
باب‌المندب: حوثی حمله D36. اگر ۶ آوریل = بسته = $۱۵۰+.
keyActors: US: 7 manned aircraft lost (NPR confirms). WSO still missing — IRGC denies capture, governor offers commendation. 15 KIA + 520+ wounded. NPR: 'total air dominance' claims contradicted. Bushehr + Mahshahr strikes = pre-positioning for April 6. UK hosting 40-nation Hormuz talks. Oil ~$115. 2 days to deadline.

Israel: IDF struck Quds Force command centers in Beirut + IRGC targets in Tehran (air defense, ballistic storage, weapons R&D). Continued wide-scale campaign. 163 Bushehr personnel evacuated reflects sustained nuclear/energy targeting.

Iran: Formally REJECTED ceasefire through 'continuation of attacks.' IRGC drone attacked MSC Ishyka in Hormuz. Shot down MQ-1 drone over Isfahan. UAE 23 ballistic + 56 drones = HEAVIEST UAE-targeted day. Cluster warhead Israel. IRGC views shootdowns as validation. Multi-theater at full capability.

Russia: NEW: 163 Bushehr NPP personnel evacuated to Russia via emergency airlift. Russia now directly affected by conflict. Creates diplomatic leverage and potential reaction. Rosatom involvement = nuclear dimension.
China: 5-point plan stalled. Safe passage framework growing = China-friendly. But Iran's ceasefire rejection undermines China's mediation credibility. Oil ~$115 = pain for Chinese economy.
Pakistan: Mediation framework stalling. Kharazi (back-channel lead) gravely wounded. Iran rejected ceasefire = Pakistan's intermediary role diminished.
Houthis: Claimed attack on Israel D36. Active since D29. If April 6 power grid strikes = Houthi likely escalates to Bab al-Mandab closure = both chokepoints.
IAEA: Grossi: 'deep concern — nuclear sites must never be attacked.' Bushehr 4th hit. 1 killed. 163 evacuated. 440kg unaccounted. IAEA has no enforcement power.

چین: طرح متوقف. عبور امن = چین‌پسند. اما رد ایران = اعتبار چین کاهش.
پاکستان: میانجی‌گری متوقف. خرازی زخمی. ایران رد = نقش کاهش.
حوثی: حمله اسرائیل D36. اگر ۶ آوریل = باب‌المندب.
IAEA: گروسی: نگرانی شدید. بوشهر ۴مین بار. ۱ کشته. ۱۶۳ تخلیه. قدرت اجرایی ندارد.

exponentialDecay.label: Depletion Model
exponentialDecay.description: Assumes stockpiles structurally depleted — exponential decay continues to zero
exponentialDecay.description_fa: فرض بر اتمام ساختاری ذخایر — کاهش نمایی تا صفر ادامه دارد
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome: Iran ceases offensive operations by mid-April. War ends via military exhaustion + negotiated exit. Coalition declares victory.
exponentialDecay.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران عملیات تهاجمی را تا اواسط آوریل متوقف می‌کند. جنگ با فرسایش نظامی + خروج مذاکره‌ای پایان می‌یابد.
exponentialDecay.falsifiedBy: D35 at 50/day = sustained well above exponential decay prediction. Haaretz: Iran retains half launchers + massive drones. F-15E shot down = air defense NOT degraded. Model dead since D18. Definitive falsification.

plateauRationing.label: Rationing Model
plateauRationing.description: Assumes plateau at ~30/day = strategic rationing from deeper stockpiles (IRGC D16 claim)
plateauRationing.description_fa: فرض بر جیره‌بندی استراتژیک از ذخایر عمیق‌تر (ادعای سپاه D16)
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome: Iran maintains harassment for 2+ months. War ends via negotiation under mutual exhaustion, or escalation spiral if ceiling breached. Haaretz confirms half launchers intact.
plateauRationing.projectedOutcome_fa: ایران آزار ۲+ ماه. هاآرتص: نیمی پرتاب‌کننده‌ها سالم. جنگ با مذاکره یا تشدید.
plateauRationing.falsifiedBy: Launches <15/day for 5 consecutive days. D33 surged to 65, D34=55, D35=50. Haaretz: half launchers + massive drones. Plateau CONFIRMED with surge capability. Revised plateau ~38/day (7-day avg).

vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion: D36: 45 missiles + 60 drones = sustained. DOWN from D35 (50+65) but UAE alone absorbed 23 ballistic + 56 drones. Cluster warhead Israel = advanced munitions. 7 US aircraft lost = air defense intact. IRGC attacking ships in Hormuz (MSC Ishyka). MQ-1 shot down Isfahan. Score HOLDS 7 — Iran demonstrating multi-capability.
vectorNotes.militaryExhaustion_fa: D36: ۴۵ موشک + ۶۰ پهپاد. امارات ۲۳+۵۶. کلاهک خوشه‌ای. ۷ هواپیما. MSC ایشیکا. MQ-1 ساقط. ۷.
vectorNotes.economicPain: Brent ~$115 (+2.3%). Dated Brent PHYSICAL $141.37 (Bloomberg) — unprecedented since 2008. Bushehr NPP + Mahshahr petrochemical = energy infrastructure targeting BOTH sides. Oil entrenched above $110. Apr 6 = 2 days: if strikes proceed, $130-150+. Score HOLDS 10. MAXIMUM.
vectorNotes.economicPain_fa: برنت ~$۱۱۵. فیزیکی $۱۴۱ (بلومبرگ) = بی‌سابقه از ۲۰۰۸. بوشهر + ماهشهر = انرژی هر دو طرف. ۱۰ = حداکثر.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum: COLLAPSED: Iran formally REJECTED ceasefire through 'continuation of attacks' not diplomacy. No mediator active. China-Pakistan plan stalled. Kharazi wounded. 2 days insufficient for new track. Bushehr 163 to Russia = complicates further. Score DOWN 4.5->3.5 — last track destroyed.
vectorNotes.diplomaticMomentum_fa: فروپاشی: ایران رد رسمی از طریق حملات نه دیپلماسی. میانجی فعال ندارد. ۲ روز ناکافی. ۱۶۳ به روسیه. ۳.۵.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability: 7 US AIRCRAFT LOST (NPR confirms): WSO still missing — IRGC denies capture but governor offers commendation = daily news cycle. Gas $4.30+ est. Oil ~$115. 15 KIA + 1 missing. Bushehr evacuation to Russia = international incident. Score HOLDS 1 — already near floor.
vectorNotes.usPoliticalSustainability_fa: ۷ هواپیما ساقط (NPR تأیید). WSO مفقود — سپاه رد بازداشت. بنزین $۴.۳۰+. نفت ~$۱۱۵. بوشهر به روسیه. ۱.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance: AT THE CEILING: April 6 = 2 DAYS. Iran formally rejected ceasefire. Bushehr NPP hit 4th time (163 to Russia = Russia dimension). Mahshahr petrochemical struck = coalition already hitting energy. WSO missing = cannot pause. NO diplomatic track. Coalition pre-positioning for power grid. Score HOLDS 0.5 — cannot go lower without actual strikes beginning.
vectorNotes.escalationCeilingDistance_fa: در سقف: ۶ آوریل = ۲ روز. ایران رد رسمی. بوشهر ۴مین بار (۱۶۳ به روسیه). ماهشهر = از قبل هدف. WSO مفقود. مسیر ندارد. ۰.۵.

warOutcome.prediction: REVISED: April 6 power grid strikes NEAR-CERTAIN (38% escalation). Iran formally REJECTED ceasefire = no diplomatic path. Bushehr NPP 4th hit + Mahshahr petrochemical = coalition already degrading energy infrastructure PRE-deadline. 163 evacuated to Russia = new international dimension. WSO missing = US cannot pause. Oil ~$115 (physical $141). ALL indicators point to April 6 power grid strikes. Most probable: power grid struck Mon Apr 6 -> 90M without electricity -> humanitarian catastrophe -> forced international intervention 2-3 weeks.
warOutcome.prediction_fa: بازنگری: حمله نیروگاه ۶ آوریل تقریباً قطعی (۳۸٪). ایران رد رسمی = مسیر دیپلماتیک نمانده. بوشهر ۴مین بار + ماهشهر = از قبل تخریب. ۱۶۳ به روسیه. WSO مفقود. نفت ~$۱۱۵ (فیزیکی $۱۴۱). دوشنبه ۶ آوریل: نیروگاه -> ۹۰M بدون برق -> فاجعه -> مداخله ۲-۳ هفته.
warOutcome.derivation: MilExh 7 (HOLDS — 45+60, cluster warheads, 7 aircraft lost, MSC Ishyka) + EconPain 10 (HOLDS MAXIMUM — $115, physical $141, Bushehr + Mahshahr) + DiplMom 3.5 (DOWN — formal ceasefire rejection, no track) + USPol 1 (HOLDS — 6 aircraft, WSO missing, gas $4.30+) + EscCeil 0.5 (HOLDS — 2 days, no diplomatic path, pre-positioning). Diplomatic collapse = escalation becomes default. No off-ramp visible.
warOutcome.derivation_fa: فرسایش ۷ + اقتصادی ۱۰ (حداکثر) + دیپلماسی ۳.۵ (فروپاشی) + سیاسی ۱ + سقف ۰.۵. فروپاشی دیپلماسی = تشدید پیش‌فرض.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation: 6.7/10 = HIGH and RISING (from 6.6). Weighted: MilExh(7*0.25) + EconPain(10*0.20) + DiplMom(3.5*0.20) + USPol(1*0.20) + EscCeil(0.5*0.15) = 1.75+2.0+0.7+0.2+0.075 = 4.725 raw -> normalized 6.7. Diplomatic COLLAPSE (3.5, down from 4.5) is driving score higher. Economic pain at MAXIMUM. Escalation ceiling at 0.5. April 6 = 2 days with ZERO diplomatic path. Convergence toward escalation is now near-total.
warOutcome.convergenceInterpretation_fa: ۶.۷/۱۰ = بالا و افزایش از ۶.۶. فروپاشی دیپلماسی (۳.۵ از ۴.۵) = محرک اصلی. اقتصادی حداکثر. سقف ۰.۵. ۲ روز بدون مسیر. همگرایی تقریباً کامل.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.
publishingDeepDive_fa: کاغذ و مرکب: ایران ۷۰٪+ کاغذ چاپ وارد می‌کند. هرمز + تحریم = زنجیره قطع. کارخانه‌ها ۲۰-۳۰٪ ظرفیت.
ظرفیت چاپ: چاپخانه‌های تهران متناوب. قطع اینترنت ۷۶۸+ ساعت = پیش‌چاپ دیجیتال ناممکن. ۸۰-۹۰٪ کاهش.
توزیع: شبکه (شهر کتاب و غیره) مختل. ۸۲,۰۰۰+ ساختمان آسیب. فروشگاه‌ها بسته. سفارش آنلاین ناممکن.
سانسور: ارشاد احتمالاً فعال اما ظرفیت نامشخص. مجوز کتاب ممکن تعلیق.
بقای ناشران: ناشران کوچک/متوسط بحران وجودی. انتشارات دانشگاهی بهتر. انتظار ادغام/تعطیلی پس از جنگ.
جایگزین دیجیتال: طاقچه، فیدیبو غیرفعال. پس بازگشت اینترنت سریع‌تر. اما دانشگاه‌ها نسخه فیزیکی نیاز دارند.

dubaiBankingRisk.detail: D36: Bushehr NPP 4th hit (163 to Russia). Mahshahr petrochemical struck. MSC Ishyka attacked in Hormuz. Oil ~$115 (physical $141). Iran rejected ceasefire. April 6 = 2 DAYS. Score HOLDS 10 = MAXIMUM.
dubaiBankingRisk.detail_fa: D36: بوشهر ۴مین (۱۶۳ به روسیه). ماهشهر. MSC ایشیکا. نفت ~$۱۱۵ (فیزیکی $۱۴۱). ایران رد. ۲ روز. ۱۰ = حداکثر.
dubaiBankingRisk.action: CRITICAL: Withdraw ALL Gulf funds (UAE + Qatar). Move to Tbilisi/KL IMMEDIATELY. Banking system at maximum stress.

alternativeHubs.notes: Strong logistics infrastructure. Turkish banks cautious on Iran-linked trade but not frozen. Erdogan mediator role creates political cover. Risk: Turkey's NATO membership creates compliance friction. Currency volatility (TRY).
Oman traditionally neutral. Banking corridor to Iran still partially open. BUT port targeted by 2 UAVs D29 — risk profile changing. Proximity to conflict zone.
Safe from conflict. Growing Iranian diaspora + business presence. Limited logistics infrastructure. Small banking sector. Good for cash preservation, poor for trade operations.

Furthest from conflict. CIMB + Maybank process Iran-adjacent trade. Free zones available. Challenge: time zone, distance from customers, unfamiliar regulatory environment. BEST for risk-averse repositioning.

alternativeHubs_fa.notes: لجستیک قوی. بانک‌ها محتاط. اردوغان میانجی. ریسک: ناتو + نوسان لیر.
عمان خنثی. بانک باز. اما بندر هدف D29. نزدیک منطقه درگیری.
امن. لجستیک محدود. بانک کوچک. برای حفظ نقدینگی.
دورترین. CIMB + Maybank. منطقه آزاد. بهترین برای ریسک‌گریزی.

Requires: mines cleared, insurance normalized, port infrastructure repaired, Bab al-Mandab safe (Houthi factor). 1,000+ stranded tankers to process.

مین + بیمه + بندر + باب‌المندب. ۱,۰۰۰+ نفتکش معطل.

strandedCargo.detail_fa: اکثر بار بیمه. پردازش خسارت تأخیر. فاسدشدنی (~۱۵٪) از دست رفته. غیرفاسدشدنی در انبار اما هزینه روزانه (~$۱۵۰/کانتینر/روز).

insuranceCostIndex.note: D36: MSC Ishyka (Israel-linked) attacked by IRGC drone in Hormuz — on fire. Bushehr NPP 4th hit. Mahshahr petrochemical struck. Hull 13.5% = UNINSURABLE. War risk 5.2% = highest since 1980s tanker war. IRGC selectively targeting = ship-specific risk assessment required.
